title: Evidence DB research_run lineage + live-derived atlas card projection v0

affected_modules: evidence DB operator spine CLI wiring
acceptance_criteria: Evidence DB NM-1/NM-4 operator path can populate research_runs with question lineage on temp DB.

No public routes/site/schema migration/review_batch; default pytest mock-only.
non_goals: Full research_queue follow-up generation (defer unless minimal).
rollback_plan: Revert atlas card projection changes; keep ticket-293 operator report as baseline.
